text:
Multi-Equality
• The order of the fields in the index is important. The ones that filter out more data should be on
the left.
- There are a million people with name Miguel.
- There are half million people that are 35 years old.
- There are 100 people leaving in Mayor Street.
• In other words, higher cardinality better. Being cardinality uniqueness of data values
contained in a field.
• What would be the best index?
